popularStory.headline: John L. Vinton Biography and immigrant posterity (entered by Michael A. Kennedy)
popularStory.description:
John L. VINTON

    Vinton is a name deeply rooted in the geography of Britian. There is a Venton in Cornwall, a Winton in Suffolk, and Allwinton in Northumberland. Vinton, Venton and Winton were co …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Vinton於1620年出生在英國哈普爾洛姆時，他的父親Lt Robert Vinton25歲，母親Jane Stones22歲。他於1646年7月20日與Ann Eleanor Moore在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可琳結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1664年8月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Vinton于1620年出生在英国哈普爾洛姆时，他的父亲Lt Robert Vinton25岁，母亲Jane Stones22岁。他于1646年7月20日与Ann Eleanor Moore在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可琳结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1664年8月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Finton   with voicing of the initial consonant (see   Fenton  ). In Sussex and Kent the name was probably confused with   Winton  .

variants.name: Finton
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Fenton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Vinton was born in 1620, in Romsey, Hampshire, England, his father, Lt Robert Vinton, was 25 and his mother, Jane Stones, was 22. He married Ann Eleanor Moore on 20 July 1646, in Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 3 August 1664, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Vinton est né en 1620, à Romsey, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Lt Robert Vinton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane Stones, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ann Eleanor Moore le 20 juillet 1646, à Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 3 août 1664, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 44 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Vinton è nato il nel 1620 nel Romsey, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Lt Robert Vinton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Jane Stones, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ann Eleanor Moore il 20 luglio 1646, nel Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 agosto 1664, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British C: イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウン
ja.lifeSummary: John Vintonが1620年にイギリスハンプシュアイアロムセイで生まれた時，父Lt Robert Vintonは25歳，母Jane Stonesは22歳であった。1646年7月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスリンでAnn Eleanor Mooreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1664年8月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで44歳で死去した。

ko.Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 린
ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘
ko.Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 린
ko.New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운
ko.lifeSummary: John Vinton(이)가 1620년 영국 함프실르 롬시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lt Robert Vinton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Stones(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1646년 7월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 린에서 Ann Eleanor Moore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1664년 8월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Vinton nasceu em 1620, em Romsey, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lt Robert Vinton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jane Stones, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Eleanor Moore em 20 de julho de 1646, em Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1664, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 44 anos.

ru.Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, B: линн, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика

ru.New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British C: нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Vinton родился в 1620 г. в местности ромси, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lt Robert Vinton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Stones, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Eleanor Moore 20 июля 1646 г. в местности линн, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 3 августа 1664 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Vinton nació en 1620, en Romsey, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lt Robert Vinton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jane Stones, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ann Eleanor Moore el 20 de julio de 1646, en Lynn, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1664, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 44 años.
